task.title: How to Add Text, Music, and Audio to a Video
task.shortdesc: Learn how to add text, music, and audio to improve the appearance and engagement of your video. Completing this task will help make your content clearer and more visually appealing for social media.

taskbody.prereq: Before starting this task, complete How to Import, Arrange, and Trim Video Clips and make sure your project is open in CapCut.
taskbody.context: Adding text and audio can improve communication, pacing, and engagement in short-form videos. Text helps explain information or emphasize important points, while music and sound effects can influence the mood and energy of a video.

step.cmd: Tap Text in the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

step.stepresult: A text box appears on the screen.

step.cmd: Type the text you want displayed in your video.
step.info: Keep captions short and readable for social media viewers.
step.stepresult: The text appears in the preview window.

step.cmd: Adjust the font, size, color, and position of the text.
step.info: Choose fonts and colors that are easy to read against your video background.
step.stepresult: The customized text appears in your project.

step.cmd: Select Sounds to browse music options.

choices.choice: • Trending music for social media content
• Sound effects for transitions or emphasis

step.cmd: Tap a sound or song to preview it.
step.info: Choose audio that matches the tone and pacing of your video.

step.cmd: Tap Add to insert the audio into your project.
step.stepresult: The audio appears beneath the video timeline.

step.cmd: Adjust the length or position of the audio track if needed.
step.info: Audio can be shortened or moved to better match the timing of clips.
step.stepresult: The audio aligns with your video clips.

step.cmd: Tap Play to preview the video with text and audio.
step.info: Previewing helps check whether captions are readable and audio timing feels natural.
step.stepresult: The edited video plays in the preview window.

taskbody.result: You have successfully added text, music, and audio to your video. Your project now includes captions and sound that improve clarity and viewer engagement.
taskbody.postreq: Continue to How to Add Transitions and Export a Video for Social Media.
